Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Or Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With Disability
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Bank, FSB, a federal savings bank; American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Abel Padilla, aka Abel G. Padilla, aka Abel Radilla, an individual.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $36,815.57
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $555.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,370.57
Judgment signed in open court.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Marc Pelta, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Sogelau Ioane, guardian ad litem for Minor: Jermiesha Robinson, present in court.
Sandra Tan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Keith Williams Jr. as Intervenor.
Petitioner and minor sworn and examined.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $125,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $ 41,250.00 payable to Law Firm of Marc Pelta dba Pelta Law.
Costs: $2830.95
Pro-rata share of Litigation Costs owed and payable to Dolan Law, 1438 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94102: $7,926.16
A net balance of $72,992.89 to be deposited into an annuity at New York Life Insurance Company to fund future periodic payments.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into Annuity.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 8, 2017, at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into an annuity. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
